name: toast
title: Toast Notification
description: Bottom-center transient toast for action confirmations. Refined from the live single .toast pill (one node the global toast() function rewrote and flashed via a .show class) into a reusable, semantic notification: an icon chip, a message with an optional dismiss (✕), and one local --oo-toast-accent custom property so a tone modifier (success / info / error / warning) only flips the accent + tint. A separate .oo-toast-host fixes a stack of toasts to the viewport bottom-center, or with --contained confines them to a positioned ancestor (the gallery stage). Resting toasts stay fully visible so they read statically; spawned ones run the .is-show enter animation and fade out with .is-hiding, mirroring the live 2.4s auto-dismiss. Honours prefers-reduced-motion; close button carries hover / focus-visible / disabled states.
